summary: Completed testing of Round-Robin lead visibility fix. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). The fix ensures Sales/Pre-Sales users ONLY see their own assigned leads, while Super Admin sees all leads. The fix-unassigned endpoint now handles both sales AND pre-sales leads.

issues: Shows 'No Pre-Sales team members yet' and 'No Sales team members yet' even though team members exist in the system. Lead Distribution Engine shows 'Disabled'.

critical_code_review_comments: The lead visibility fix correctly implements strict assigned_to filtering for sales/pre-sales users
Search now uses $and to combine filters instead of overwriting the assigned_to filter
Fix-unassigned endpoint handles both sales and pre-sales leads
seed_data_creation: Created test leads with prefix TEST_VIS_ and TEST_RR_ for visibility and round-robin testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead visibility fix verified. Key changes: 1) Sales/Pre-Sales users now see ONLY their own assigned leads (strict assigned_to filter), 2) Super Admin sees ALL leads (no filter), 3) Search uses $and to combine filters, 4) Fix-unassigned endpoint handles both sales AND pre-sales leads. Tests: test_lead_visibility_fix.py (18 tests) and test_round_robin_assignment.py (11 tests) all pass.

backend: test_02_get_sales_and_presales_users - Get list of sales and pre-sales users
test_03_admin_sees_all_sales_leads - Super Admin sees ALL sales leads
test_04_admin_sees_all_presales_leads - Super Admin sees ALL pre-sales leads
test_05_create_test_sales_leads_for_specific_users - Create test leads for specific users
test_06_sales_dashboard_filtered_by_user - Sales dashboard is_filtered=false for admin
test_08_fix_unassigned_endpoint_handles_both_types - Fix endpoint handles sales AND pre-sales
test_10_search_respects_user_filter - Search works with user filter
test_11_verify_round_robin_on_new_sales_lead - New sales lead auto-assigned via round-robin
test_12_verify_distribution_settings - Distribution settings have valid team members
test_13_verify_leads_have_assigned_to - Sales leads have assigned_to populated
frontend: Login page loads correctly with Demo Access tab
Marketing Board loads with Lead Distribution Engine
Pre-Sales CRM loads with Kanban board and stage columns

verified_fixes: Sales users see ONLY their own assigned leads (strict assigned_to filter)
Pre-Sales users see ONLY their own assigned leads (strict assigned_to filter)
Super Admin sees ALL leads (no assigned_to filter)
Search uses $and to combine filters (doesn't overwrite assigned_to)
